headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Evergy (EVRG) After A 30% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Evergy's current share price still offers value, the recent performance and headline activity make it a stock worth looking at more closely. At a last close of US$83.58, Evergy has returns of 0.9% over 7 days, 3.2% over 30 days, 14.4% year to date, 30.4% over 1 year, 54.6% over 3 years and 61.1% over 5 years. This provides several data points to weigh against its underlying worth. Recent news coverage has focused on Evergy in the context of the wider Electric...
